accessNotes.en: O Agios Vasileios/Lapathos proseggizetai me apaititiko monopati. To teliko katevasma pros tin paralia perigrafetai os poly apotomo. Choris organomenes paroches.

accessNotes.en: Oi piges perigrafoun ti Sarah/Sara Beach os mikri akti konta ston Gialo tis Symis, peripou 15-20 lepta me ta podia apo to limani, me prosvasi apo skalia/paraktio perpatima.
accessNotes.gr: Οι πηγές περιγράφουν τη Sarah/Sara Beach ως μικρή ακτή κοντά στον Γιαλό της Σύμης, περίπου 15-20 λεπτά με τα πόδια από το λιμάνι, με πρόσβαση από σκαλιά/παράκτιο περπάτημα.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Symi low cleanup 2026-05-28: OSM/Mapcarta supports same-name Sara Beach identity/location near the current coordinates. BeachAtlas supports Sarah/Sara Beach in Symi as a small cove about 15-20 minutes walking from the port, reached by steps, with pebble/rock terrain and some shade. High Heels & a Backpack supports coastal walking access from Ano Symi toward Sarah Beach. Conflicting organized-service claims were not encoded. No live condition claim was encoded.
